title: Item Catcher
description: Catch items that fall into the void, explosion and fireproof items, and auto collect before they despawn.
body:
### Features
* Auto collect items & exp that are about to despawn
* Auto collect items & exp that have fallen into the void
* All items & exp are invulnerable. Immune to fire, lava, cactus, explosions, etc.
* Ignores common mob drops and cactus
* Ignores items dropped by players (Dropped items are not invulnerable)

While this mod is perfect for Skyblock, it's not limited to it. I know I've had my fair share of losing the sapling of the first tree in Skyblock to the void.

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
